title: System
subtitle: Process-level operations: command-line arguments, environment variables, platform info, and exit.

members.name: activeCpus
members.description: Returns the number of active CPUs.

members.name: args
members.description:
Returns the list of command line argument strings the program was run
   with.

members.name: distribution
members.description: Returns the Io distribution name as a string.

members.name: errorNumber
members.description: Returns the C errno string.

members.name: exit
members.description:
Shutdown the IoState (io_free all objects) and return
control to the calling program (if any).

members.name: getEnvironmentVariable
members.description:
Returns a string with the value of the environment
    variable whose name is specified by nameString.

members.name: getOptions
members.description:
This primitive is used to get command line options similar to Cs getopt(). It returns a map in containing the left side of the argument, with the value of the right side. (The key will not contain the beginning dashes (--).

Example: 

	options := System getOptions(args)
	options foreach(k, v,
	  if(v type == List type,
		v foreach(i, j, writeln(\"Got unnamed argument with value: \" .. j))
		continue
	  )
	  writeln(\"Got option: \" .. k .. \" with value: \" .. v)
	)

members.name: installPrefix
members.description: Returns the root path where io was installed. The default is /usr/local.

members.name: ioPath
members.description: Returns the path of io installation. The default is $INSTALL_PREFIX/lib/io.

members.name: iospecVersion
members.description: The version of IoSpec our IoVM is compatible with

members.name: iovmName
members.description: The name of our IoVM as used by IoSpec

members.name: launchPath
members.description: Returns a pathComponent of the launch file.

members.name: launchScript
members.description: Returns the path of the io file run on the command line. Returns nil if no file was run.

members.name: maxRecycledObjects
members.description: Returns the max number of recycled objects used.

members.name: platform
members.description: Returns a string description of the platform.

members.name: platformVersion
members.description: Returns the version id of the OS.

members.name: recycledObjectCount
members.description: Returns the current number of objects being held for recycling.

members.name: runCommand
members.description: Calls system and redirects stdout/err to tmp files.  Returns object with exitStatus, stdout and stderr slots.

members.name: setEnvironmentVariable
members.description: Sets the environment variable keyString to the value valueString.

members.name: setLobby
members.description: Sets the root object of the garbage collector.

members.name: setMaxRecycledObjects
members.description: Sets the max number of recycled objects used.

members.name: sleep
members.description: Performs a *blocking* sleep call for specified number of seconds.

members.name: symbols
members.description: Returns a List containing all Symbols currently in the system.

members.name: system
members.description: Makes a system call and returns a Number for the return value.

members.name: thisProcessPid
members.description: Return the process id (pid) for this Io process.

members.name: userInterruptHandler
members.description: Called when control-c is hit. Override to add custom behavior. Returns self.

members.name: version
members.description: Returns a version number for Io.
